title: Abacosa americana

The genus Abacosa belongs to the infraorder Araneomorphae and the class Arachnida. Abacosa americana is a member of the phylum Arthropoda and kingdom Animalia. This classification reflects its evolutionary history and distinct characteristics.

side_effects: Abacosa americana is a type of tarantula, and like other arachnids, its venom can cause pain and swelling in humans.
